Home / Services / Electrical Repair Services

Electrical Repair Services

Fast, reliable electrical repair services for Minneapolis homes and businesses.

From flickering lights and faulty outlets to circuit breaker problems and wiring issues, electrical repairs can be a major headache. Tim Kunkel Electric offers comprehensive electrical repair services to address any problem, big or small. We understand the urgency of electrical issues, especially during harsh Minneapolis winters when heating systems rely on a stable power supply. Our experienced technicians will diagnose the problem quickly and provide efficient, lasting solutions.

We handle everything from simple outlet replacements to complex wiring repairs, always adhering to the strictest safety standards. We're familiar with the unique electrical challenges posed by older Minneapolis homes, from outdated wiring to overloaded circuits. Whether you live in a charming Craftsman in Linden Hills or a modern condo downtown, we have the expertise to keep your electrical system running smoothly.

Before starting any repair, we'll provide you with a clear, upfront estimate, so you know exactly what to expect. No hidden fees, no surprises. We use only quality materials and proven techniques to ensure the long-term reliability of our repairs. Don't let electrical problems disrupt your life – call Tim Kunkel Electric for fast, dependable service.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Contact us to describe your electrical issue.
  2. 02 Step 2: We'll schedule a convenient appointment for diagnosis.
  3. 03 Step 3: Our technician will assess the problem and provide a detailed estimate.
  4. 04 Step 4: Upon your approval, we'll complete the repair efficiently and safely.

Benefits

  • Fast response times
  • Experienced and licensed electricians
  • Upfront pricing
  • Guaranteed workmanship

Frequently Asked Questions

How quickly can you respond to an electrical emergency?

We offer 24/7 emergency service and strive to respond to urgent calls within the hour, depending on your location in Minneapolis.

What types of electrical repairs do you handle?

We handle a wide range of repairs, including outlets, switches, wiring, circuit breakers, lighting fixtures, and more. No job is too big or too small.

Are your electricians licensed and insured?

Yes, all of our electricians are fully licensed and insured, ensuring your safety and peace of mind.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with electrical repair services? Contact us today.
